mechanic.name: Bounty: Armor Break
mechanic.desc: Each Resilience Break inflicted on the boss by friendly units grants <color=#ec6d21>400</color> Technique Score, up to <color=#ec6d21>5</color> times, totaling <color=#ec6d21>2000</color> points.

mechanic.name: !NONEED!
mechanic.desc: None

mechanic.name: Bounty: Armor Break
mechanic.desc: Each Resilience Break inflicted on the boss by friendly units grants <color=#ec6d21>400</color> Technique Score, up to <color=#ec6d21>5</color> times, totaling <color=#ec6d21>2000</color> points.

mechanic.name: !NONEED!
mechanic.desc: None

mechanic.name: Bounty: Knife Destroyer
mechanic.desc: Each Blade thrown by the boss and destroyed by friendly units grants <color=#ec6d21>180</color> Technique Score, up to <color=#ec6d21>30</color> times, totaling <color=#ec6d21>5400</color> points.

mechanic.name: Pyro Blight
mechanic.desc:
The boss gains a Fire Ring, increasing their DMG dealt by <color=#ec6d21>30%</color> and continuously dealing DMG to your squad within the ring.
Triggering 3 Elemental Marks on the boss within 5s grants the squad Enhancement, increasing Auto Attack DMG by <color=#ec6d21>30%</color> for 10s, and disables the boss's Fire Ring for 10s.

mechanic.name: Bounty: Blower Bane
mechanic.desc: Whenever a boss casts a skill with Tornado, dodging the Tornado grants <color=#ec6d21>540</color>Technique Score, up to <color=#ec6d21>10</color> times, totaling <color=#ec6d21>5400</color> points.

mechanic.name: Fervent Combat
mechanic.desc:
The boss gains 1 stack of Battle Frenzy every 5 seconds, increasing the DMG it deals by <color=#ec6d21>10%</color> (up to 5 stacks).
When the Main Trekker triggers a Mark, removes 1 stack of Battle Frenzy from the boss. Successfully removing a stack of Battle Frenzy restores 20 Energy for the squad, and increases the boss's Ultimate DMG Taken by <color=#ec6d21>100%</color>, lasting for 10s and resets when triggered again.

mechanic.name: Bounty: Combo
mechanic.desc: Dealing continuous DMG to a boss for <color=#ec6d21>5</color>s by friendly units grants <color=#ec6d21>360</color>Technique Score, up to <color=#ec6d21>15</color> times, totaling <color=#ec6d21>5400</color> points.

mechanic.name: Devouring Dark Ring
mechanic.desc:
When the boss possesses Dark Ring, its DMG increases by <color=#ec6d21>30%</color>, and it deals an additional AoE DMG every 5s.
Dealing 20 hits to the boss within 3s disables the boss's Dark Ring for 15s. The boss also takes <color=#ec6d21>65%</color> more Skill DMG dealt by Support Trekkers during this period.

mechanic.name: Bounty: Balloon Shooter
mechanic.desc: Every <color=#ec6d21>3</color> Wind Puff minions destroyed grants <color=#ec6d21>675</color> Technique Score, up to <color=#ec6d21>8</color> times, totaling <color=#ec6d21>5400</color> points.

mechanic.name: Reality Shift
mechanic.desc:
The boss shifts between Illusion Form and Reality Form every <color=#ec6d21>15s</color>.
In Reality Form, the boss takes <color=#ec6d21>50%</color> more Minion DMG. Triggering a mark increases the current form's duration by <color=#ec6d21>0.6</color>s. It can only be triggered once per sec.
In Illusion Form, the boss takes <color=#ec6d21>50%</color> increased Skill DMG. Dealing Minion DMG each time increases the current form's duration by <color=#ec6d21>0.6</color>s. It can only be triggered once per sec.

mechanic.name: Bounty: Pearl Cascade
mechanic.desc: Whenever a Light Bulb summoned by the boss lands, destroying it grants <color=#ec6d21>900</color> Technique Score, up to <color=#ec6d21>6</color> times, totaling <color=#ec6d21>5400</color> points.

mechanic.name: Call Down the Thunder
mechanic.desc:
When the boss has Thunderbolt, its DMG is increased by <color=#ec6d21>30%</color> and deals additional DMG in a small area 4 times every 3s.
Dealing Support Skill DMG <color=#ec6d21>20</color> times to the boss within <color=#ec6d21>5</color>s disables Thunderbolt for 15s, and increases the Skill DMG the boss takes from Support Trekkers by <color=#ec6d21>40%</color> for the duration.

mechanic.name: Bounty: Blade Collector
mechanic.desc: Each Blade reclaimed by the boss increases Technique Score by <color=#ec6d21>270</color>, up to <color=#ec6d21>20</color> times, totaling <color=#ec6d21>5400</color> points.

mechanic.name: Momentum
mechanic.desc: The boss gains a <color=#ec6d21>30%</color> DMG Boost. For each player Minion on the field, the boss deals <color=#ec6d21>10%</color> less DMG and is afflicted with <color=#ec6d21>10%</color> VUL. This effect stacks up to 3 times and persists for <color=#ec6d21>3</color>s after the Minion disappears.

mechanic.name: Bounty: Petal Dodger
mechanic.desc: Each successful dodge from the boss's flower volley increases Technique Score by <color=#ec6d21>675</color>, up to <color=#ec6d21>8</color> times, totaling <color=#ec6d21>5400</color> points.

mechanic.name: Focus
mechanic.desc:
The boss gains a stack of Focus after taking DMG for <color=#ec6d21>20</color> times, boosting its DMG Dealt by <color=#ec6d21>15%</color>.
Triggering a Mark <color=#ec6d21>2</color> times within <color=#ec6d21>6</color>s clears all Focus stacks. For the next <color=#ec6d21>20</color>s, the boss takes <color=#ec6d21>65%</color> more DMG from Support Skills. This effect triggers up to once every <color=#ec6d21>15</color>s. Retriggering resets the duration.

mechanic.name: Bounty: Nimble Reflexes
mechanic.desc: Whenever the boss casts a Charge skill, dodging the Charge grants <color=#ec6d21>675</color> Technique Score, up to <color=#ec6d21>8</color> times, totaling <color=#ec6d21>5400</color> points.

mechanic.name: Baron Stance
mechanic.desc:
The boss alternates between Warrior and Honeypot forms, switching every <color=#ec6d21>30</color>s and clearing all its debuffs (Resilience Break does not count toward the timer).
In Warrior form, Count of the Duloos takes <color=#ec6d21>30%</color> reduced Ultimate DMG and <color=#ec6d21>65%</color> increased Auto Attack DMG.
In Honeypot form, Count of the Duloos takes <color=#ec6d21>30%</color> reduced Mark DMG and <color=#ec6d21>65%</color> increased Skill DMG.

mechanic.name: Bounty: Watch Your Step
mechanic.desc: Whenever the boss casts a skill that triggers Ground Fissure, dodging the Ground Fissure grants <color=#ec6d21>540</color> Technique Score, up to <color=#ec6d21>10</color> times, totaling <color=#ec6d21>5400</color> points.

mechanic.name: Aqua Ring
mechanic.desc:
While the boss possesses Water Ring, its DMG is increased by <color=#ec6d21>30%</color>, and it deals AoE DMG every 5s.
Dealing <color=#ec6d21>10</color> instances of DMG to the boss within 5s disables Water Ring for <color=#ec6d21>20</color>s. When Water Ring is disabled:
Dealing <color=#ec6d21>20</color> instances of Support DMG to the boss within 5s increases the Auto Attack DMG the boss takes by<color=#ec6d21>45%</color>.
Dealing <color=#ec6d21>10</color> instances of Main Trekker DMG within 5s increases the Skill DMG the boss takes from Support Trekkers by <color=#ec6d21>45%</color>.

mechanic.name: Bounty: Armor Break
mechanic.desc: Each Resilience Break inflicted on the boss by friendly units grants <color=#ec6d21>400</color> Technique Score, up to <color=#ec6d21>5</color> times, totaling <color=#ec6d21>2000</color> points.

mechanic.name: !NONEED!
mechanic.desc: None
